zh.lifeSummary: 當John Rogers於1468年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓時，他的父親Sir Edwin Henry Rogers20歲，母親Amy Stourton14歲。他於1480年與Catherine Courtenay在英國英格蘭戴文波德哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1547年5月25日在他的家鄉享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Rogers was born in 1468, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, was 20 and his mother, Amy Stourton, was 14. He married Catherine Courtenay in 1480, in Powderham, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 May 1547, in his hometown, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Rogers est né en 1468, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Amy Stourton, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Courtenay en 1480, à Powderham, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1547, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 79 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Rogers è nato il nel 1468 nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Amy Stourton, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Courtenay nel 1480, nel Powderham, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 maggio 1547, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Rogersが1468年にイギリスイギリスドールセトブリアンストンで生まれた時，父Sir Edwin Henry Rogersは20歳，母Amy Stourtonは14歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスデボンポウデルハムでCatherine Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1547年5月25日に故郷で79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Rogers(이)가 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edwin Henry Rogers(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy Stourton(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 파우더함에서 Catherine Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1547년 5월 25일 그의 고향에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Catherine Courtenay em 1480, em Powderham, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Rogers родился в 1468 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edwin Henry Rogers было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy Stourton, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Courtenay в 1480 г. в местности поудирам, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 мая 1547 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 79 лет.
